name: ge-agent-factory
description: GE Agent Factory skills for Claude Code: bootstrap the factory from a bare machine, then operate it — capture contracts, compile behavioral evals, build, prove locally and live, hand off, drive, and bench.

plugins.name: factory-bootstrap
plugins.description: Install the GE Agent Factory from nothing: clone, mise toolchain (Bun/Python/uv/Terraform), dependencies, the ge command, and a verified first proof — with a phase-by-phase check so re-runs are safe. Start here on a machine that does not have the factory yet.

plugins.name: factory-operator
plugins.description: The full operator skill set for a machine that has the factory installed: run the assembly line end to end (contracts, builds, simulators, releases), verify the shipped agent over its live assist surface (drive, live proof, latency budgets), and triage runs — with the guarding safety rail composed in.
